raw_json: {"view_type":"living room","room_function":"resting","style_hint":"traditional","clutter_level":"low","visual_feature":[{"type":"curtain","description":"large beige draped fabric partially blocking the view","relative_position_laterality":"center","relative_position_distance":"near","relative_position_verticality":"middle","distance_from_camera_m":0.5,"support_relation":"hanging_on","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Thick beige/cream fabric with soft vertical folds, appears to be a heavy curtain or draped cloth immediately in front of the camera and occupying much of the central plane. Opaque, slightly wrinkled, with a smooth matte texture and subtle shadowing indicating weight. Blocks a substantial portion of the scene to its right.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Directly between camera and the chair; in front of the lower wall panels and partly overlaps the carved chair armrest."},{"type":"wall feature","description":"floral patterned wallpaper on the right and rear walls","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"high","distance_from_camera_m":1.5,"support_relation":"attached_to","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Dense, vintage-style wallpaper with small-to-medium scale floral motifs in muted colors (pinks, greens, beiges) on a darker ground. Pattern is continuous across the upper wall and appears slightly faded, giving an aged appearance. Covers the right-side and rear wall surfaces visible in the frame.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Covers the wall area behind the chair, behind the framed portrait, and above the wainscoting/panels."},{"type":"wall feature","description":"decorative lower wall panels with painted botanical motifs","relative_position_laterality":"center","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"low","distance_from_camera_m":1.2,"support_relation":"attached_to","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Wooden or plaster wainscoting/panels along the lower portion of the wall. Each panel contains a painted floral/leaf motif centered on a light cream background with a narrow decorative border (gold or tan trim). Panels run horizontally along the base of the wall and are visibly aged with slight discoloration near the floor.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Runs directly behind the chair and along the base of the wall; the curtain and chair partially obscure some panels."},{"type":"chair","description":"ornate carved wooden armchair with striped upholstery","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"low","distance_from_camera_m":1.5,"support_relation":"freestanding","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"A single antique-style armchair featuring dark carved wooden frame with scrolled armrests and cabriole legs. Seat and back cushions upholstered in a narrow beige-and-white vertical stripe fabric. Visible wear/discoloration consistent with age. Chair sits on the floor near the right wall in front of the window/panel area.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Positioned to the right of the draped fabric and adjacent to the painted wall panels and window panels; framed portrait hangs above and slightly behind it."},{"type":"other","description":"ornate carved wooden arm/leg detail of the chair","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"low","distance_from_camera_m":1.6,"support_relation":"attached_to","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Close-up view of the chair's carved wooden structural elements—scrollwork and turned supports forming the arm and leg. Dark wood with intricate curves and a polished but aged finish. Visible joinery and shadowed recesses emphasize depth of carving.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Attached to the chair; near the front-right area of the chair relative to the camera."},{"type":"art","description":"framed dark oil portrait in a gilt frame","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"far","relative_position_verticality":"middle","distance_from_camera_m":2.2,"support_relation":"hanging_on","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Rectangular framed portrait of a bearded figure painted in dark tones; housed in an ornate gold/gilt frame. The painting hangs on the right wall above the wainscoting and to the side of the window/panel area. Frame appears traditional and slightly worn.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Above the painted lower panels and to the right of the window/panel; behind and above the chair."},{"type":"window","description":"tall panels or window shutters with painted floral squares","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"high","distance_from_camera_m":1.8,"support_relation":"attached_to","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Vertical white panels that look like window shutters or decorative door panels, each containing inset painted floral squares (single flower motifs in soft colors). Panels are framed in pale wood with narrow moulding and sit adjacent to the blue patterned curtain which is tied back.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Directly behind and slightly to the right of the chair; the curtain is tied to their side and the chair partially overlaps their lower portion."},{"type":"curtain","description":"blue patterned heavy curtain tied back at the right window","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"high","distance_from_camera_m":1.8,"support_relation":"hanging_on","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Full-length blue curtain with a subtle pattern (possibly floral or damask) pulled to the right and tied back. Fabric appears thick and lined, with a lighter inner facing. Tied back high enough to reveal the painted panels behind it.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Hangs to the right of the painted window panels and behind the chair; tied back near the frame of the window/panels."},{"type":"other","description":"decorative swan- or animal-shaped sculptural object on the floor","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"middle","relative_position_verticality":"low","distance_from_camera_m":1.9,"support_relation":"freestanding","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"A carved or molded decorative object with a curved neck resembling a swan or stylized animal; light beige/stone color and textured surface. Sits on the floor near the chair base and in front of the wainscoting, likely a floor ornament or small pedestal.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Placed on the floor to the right of the chair and in front of the lower wall panels."},{"type":"floor pattern","description":"wood floor with visible planks and light finish","relative_position_laterality":"center","relative_position_distance":"near","relative_position_verticality":"low","distance_from_camera_m":0.8,"support_relation":"freestanding","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Wide plank wooden flooring with a light, slightly grayish finish. Planks run roughly left-right in the image and show natural grain and some wear/staining consistent with an older interior. Floor visible beneath the chair and decorative object.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Extends from the foreground under the draped fabric toward the chair and right-side furnishings."},{"type":"wall feature","description":"upper moulding/trim near ceiling and picture frame","relative_position_laterality":"right","relative_position_distance":"far","relative_position_verticality":"high","distance_from_camera_m":2.4,"support_relation":"attached_to","any_text":"","long_form_open_description":"Decorative upper moulding and picture-rail style trim along the top of the wall, continuing above the framed portrait. Painted in a pale tone with some gilded or darker accent visible on the moulding edge. Adds to the period character of the room.","location_relative_to_other_objects":"Runs along the top of the wallpapered wall above the portrait and window panels."}],"floor_pattern":"wood","lighting_ceiling":"natural light source","wall_color":"cream/floral patterned wallpaper (muted pinks, greens on cream ground)","additional_notes":"Narrow oblique view taken close to a wall or in a gap between furniture and wall; scene shows period/traditional decor with painted panels, carved furniture, and heavy curtains. Lighting appears to come from the right (window).","image_summary":"Oblique interior view of a traditionally styled living/parlor area dominated by a large beige drape in the foreground. To the right, an ornate carved wooden armchair with striped upholstery sits in front of painted lower wall panels and floral wallpaper; a tied-back blue curtain and tall painted window/shutter panels with floral squares are immediately behind the chair. A dark oil portrait in a gilt frame hangs above the wainscoting. Decorative sculptural object resembling a swan rests on the floor near the chair. Wood plank flooring runs foreground to background. Overall the scene is low-clutter, vintage/traditional in style, with natural light entering from the right and detailed carved wood and painted botanical motifs throughout."}
